Licorice Pizza (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,318,007Details
International Box Office $15,585,542
Worldwide Box Office $32,903,549
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $162,302
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $464,543
Total $626,845
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Alana Kane and Gary Valentine grow up, run around and fall in love in the San Fernando Valley, 1973. Together, they face the treacherous navigation of first love.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$345,157 (2.0% of total gross)
Legs:9.06 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/1,977 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $19,888,726

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 26th, 2021 (Limited) by United Artists
December 25th, 2021 (Expands Wide) by United Artists

January 5th, 2022 (Wide) (Switzerland)
Video Release: March 1st, 2022 by United Artists Video
MPA Rating: R for language, sexual material and some drug use.

Running Time: 133 minutes
Award nomination: 2022 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
